summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open PRs. No PR has the complete merge preflight required for merge_candidate. Three small or medium contributor PRs have maintainer-safe repair/preflight paths with a concrete repair artifact; two waiting-on-author or broad-scope PRs require human follow-up before Clownfish should repair or merge them.

actions.reason: Repair/preflight the contributor branch rather than merge now: refresh mergeability against current main, inspect/resolve the Greptile comment if actionable, run Codex /review, then validate with corepack pnpm exec vitest run extensions/signal/src/daemon.test.ts extensions/signal/src/monitor.tool-result.autostart.test.ts and pnpm check:changed.

Human follow-up is required because the PR is explicitly waiting on author and its proof check failed. This should not be merged or repaired by Clownfish until the author/maintainer resolves the proof failure and confirms the plugin-config scope.

Human follow-up is required because the PR is broad, marked waiting on author, and touches model/default resolution across auth/provider/message-delivery risk areas. Passing checks alone are not enough for a merge recommendation.

Repair/preflight the contributor branch rather than merge now: inspect the failed Real behavior proof, verify the MiniMax request-shape test, run the narrow minimax test and pnpm check:changed, then run Codex /review before any merge recommendation.

Repair/preflight the contributor branch rather than merge now: refresh against current main, resolve the failed lint/agent-channel checks if still current, run targeted Feishu validation plus pnpm check:changed, and run Codex /review before merge.

needs_human: #72055 requires maintainer/author follow-up because it is marked waiting on author and Real behavior proof failed.
#72984 requires maintainer/author follow-up because it is marked waiting on author, size L, and spans broad model/default resolution surfaces.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair and preflight three focused contributor PR branches in this inventory shard before any merge recommendation: #71863 Signal daemon shutdown/restart, #73079 MiniMax TTS hex output, and #86901 Feishu markdown-table fallback. Do not mutate GitHub in plan mode; executor must re-fetch each PR, repair only the listed contributor branch, preserve original authorship, resolve review/check blockers, run Codex /review, and validate narrowly plus pnpm check:changed.
repair_candidate.pr_title: Repair maintainer-ready contributor PRs from inventory shard 47
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair/preflight plan for live-pr-inventory-20260617T015524-047.

Source PRs and credit:
- #71863 by ZHOUKAILIAN: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/71863
- #73079 by efe-arv: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/73079
- #86901 by name5566: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/86901

Executor instructions:
- Re-fetch live state for each PR before any branch update or merge recommendation.
- Repair contributor branches directly where maintainer_can_modify remains true.
- Keep each repair scoped to its existing files and preserve contributor attribution.
- Resolve review-bot or CI blockers before recommending merge.
- Run Codex /review after repair and address every finding.

Validation:
- corepack pnpm exec vitest run extensions/signal/src/daemon.test.ts extensions/signal/src/monitor.tool-result.autostart.test.ts
- corepack pnpm exec vitest run extensions/minimax/speech-provider.test.ts
- corepack pnpm exec vitest run extensions/feishu/src
- pnpm check:changed
validation_commands: corepack pnpm exec vitest run extensions/signal/src/daemon.test.ts extensions/signal/src/monitor.tool-result.autostart.test.ts
corepack pnpm exec vitest run extensions/feishu/src
